user.title: Arr Stack — Global Settings (1/7)
user.description: Optional global settings that apply to all services.

data_description.skip_ssl_verify: Enable if any of your services use self-signed certificates or are behind a reverse proxy with an untrusted cert. Leave disabled for normal setups.

downloads.title: Arr Stack — Downloads (2/7)
downloads.description: All fields on this page are optional — leave any field empty to skip that service.

data_description.qbittorrent_user: The username you use to log into qBittorrent Web UI
data_description.qbittorrent_password: The password for the qBittorrent Web UI
data_description.sabnzbd_api_key: Find it in SABnzbd → Config → General → API Key

media.title: Arr Stack — Media (3/7)
media.description: Radarr and Sonarr are required to use the card.

data_description.radarr_api_key: Find it in Radarr → Settings → General → API Key
data_description.sonarr_api_key: Find it in Sonarr → Settings → General → API Key

quality.title: Arr Stack — Radarr 2 / Sonarr 2 (4/7)
quality.description: Optional — configure second instances of Radarr and Sonarr. Leave empty if you only have one instance.

data_description.radarr2_url: e.g. http://192.168.1.10:7879 — URL of your second Radarr instance
data_description.radarr2_api_key: Find it in your second Radarr → Settings → General → API Key
data_description.sonarr2_url: e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8990 — URL of your second Sonarr instance
data_description.sonarr2_api_key: Find it in your second Sonarr → Settings → General → API Key

discovery.title: Arr Stack — Discovery & Subtitles (5/7)
discovery.description: Overseerr / Jellyseerr is optional. Without it, movies and shows are added directly to Radarr/Sonarr. All fields on this page can be left empty.

data_description.seerr_api_key: Find it in Overseerr/Jellyseerr → Settings → General → API Key
data_description.seerr_family_email: A non-admin Overseerr/Jellyseerr account for family members — used to show and withdraw their own requests
data_description.bazarr_api_key: Find it in Bazarr → Settings → General → API Key

data_description.plex_server_url: Leave empty to auto-detect. Fill in if auto-detection picks the wrong address (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:32400 or https://plex.yourdomain.com)
data_description.skip_plex: Or check Skip Plex setup below to skip.

jellyfin.title: Arr Stack — Tautulli & Jellystat (7/7)
jellyfin.description: Tautulli and Jellystat are optional — leave any field empty to skip that service.

data_description.tautulli_api_key: Find it in Tautulli → Settings → Web Interface → API Key
data_description.jellystat_api_key: Find it in Jellystat → Settings → API Key

abort.reconfigure_successful: Settings updated — restart Home Assistant to apply the changes.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Arr Stack can be configured.

error.invalid_url: Invalid URL — must start with http:// or https:// (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:7878)
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — check the URL and make sure the service is running and reachable from Home Assistant
error.timeout: Connection timed out — the service did not respond. Check the URL and your network
error.ssl_error: SSL error — if using http:// make sure you are not accidentally pointing to an https:// port
error.qbit_login_failed: qBittorrent login failed — check credentials and that the Web UI is enabled in qBittorrent settings
error.sabnzbd_bad_key: Invalid SABnzbd API key — find it in SABnzbd → Config → General → API Key
error.radarr_bad_key: Invalid Radarr API key — find it in Radarr → Settings → General → API Key
error.radarr_error: Radarr returned an unexpected error — check the URL and that Radarr is running
error.radarr_wrong_port: Radarr not found at this address — default port is 7878. Check the URL
error.radarr2_bad_key: Invalid Radarr 2 API key — find it in your second Radarr → Settings → General → API Key
error.radarr2_error: Radarr 2 returned an unexpected error — check the URL and that Radarr 2 is running
error.radarr2_wrong_port: Radarr 2 not found at this address — check the URL
error.sonarr_bad_key: Invalid Sonarr API key — find it in Sonarr → Settings → General → API Key
error.sonarr_error: Sonarr returned an unexpected error — check the URL and that Sonarr is running
error.sonarr_wrong_port: Sonarr not found at this address — default port is 8989. Check the URL
error.sonarr2_bad_key: Invalid Sonarr 2 API key — find it in your second Sonarr → Settings → General → API Key
error.sonarr2_error: Sonarr 2 returned an unexpected error — check the URL and that Sonarr 2 is running
error.sonarr2_wrong_port: Sonarr 2 not found at this address — check the URL
error.overseerr_bad_key: Invalid Overseerr/Jellyseerr API key — find it in Settings → General → API Key
error.overseerr_error: Overseerr/Jellyseerr returned an unexpected error — check the URL and that it is running
error.overseerr_wrong_port: Overseerr/Jellyseerr not found at this address — default port is 5055. Check the URL
error.seerr_family_bad_credentials: Wrong family account email or password
error.seerr_family_login_failed: Family account login failed — check the email and password
error.seerr_family_is_admin: The family account has admin permissions — use a non-admin account for the family account field
error.bazarr_bad_key: Invalid Bazarr API key — find it in Bazarr → Settings → General → API Key
error.bazarr_error: Bazarr returned an unexpected error — check the URL and that Bazarr is running
error.bazarr_wrong_port: Bazarr not found at this address — default port is 6767. Check the URL
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check Home Assistant logs (Settings → System → Logs) for details
error.qbit_forbidden: qBittorrent refused the connection (403 Forbidden) — go to qBittorrent → Tools → Options → Web UI → disable 'Enable Host header validation' or add Home Assistant's IP to the allowed list
error.plex_pin_failed: Could not reach Plex — check your internet connection and try again
error.plex_not_authenticated: Plex authorisation not completed — open the link, sign in, and submit again
error.tautulli_bad_key: Invalid Tautulli API key — find it in Tautulli → Settings → Web Interface → API Key
error.tautulli_error: Tautulli returned an unexpected error — check the URL and that Tautulli is running
error.tautulli_wrong_port: Tautulli not found at this address — default port is 8181. Check the URL
error.jellystat_bad_key: Invalid Jellystat API key — find it in Jellystat → Settings → API Key
error.jellystat_error: Jellystat returned an unexpected error — check the URL and that Jellystat is running
error.jellystat_wrong_port: Jellystat not found at this address — default port is 4000. Check the URL
